notes: Fixes and polish. The streak now decays correctly — miss a day (beyond a banked freeze) and it reads 0 instead of clinging to its last value. Reviewing an earlier day no longer drags your level backwards (replaying an A0 day kept you 'stuck' out of A1). The journey path now auto-centres the current day as it grows, with the first days still anchored left. In the cheatsheet every section starts collapsed with titles styled like Grammar, and the CEFR ladder drops its explanatory footnote.
